name: Reflex Dog Snackies Treats Duck Breast With Broccoli 170g
description: Snackies Prime Duck Breast Stripes are premium-quality dog treats made with 94% real duck breast , offering exceptional taste and outstanding nutritional value. These fine strips are gently air-dried to preserve their natural flavor and nutrients, resulting in a highly palatable and easily digestible snack. With a high protein content (60%) and low-fat level , these treats are ideal for maintaining lean muscle and supporting overall health. The grain-free, 100% natural formula makes them suitable for dogs with sensitivities, while the absence of added sugar and artificial additives ensures clean, honest nutrition. Packed in a reclosable pouch to maintain freshness, Snackies Prime Duck Breast Stripes are perfect as an occasional reward, training treat, or healthy snack between meals. Key Benefits 94% duck breast for premium animal protein Very high protein (60%) to support muscle health Grain-free recipe for easy digestion Low fat content , no added sugar 100% natural – no artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives Gently air-dried to lock in taste and nutrients Reclosable pouch keeps snacks fresh Nutritional Information Composition 94% Duck breast Natural vegetable glycerin Minerals Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 60% Crude Fat: 5% Crude Ash: 3% Crude Fibre: 1.7% Moisture: 16% Feeding & Storage Advice Feed as a complementary treat between meals Always provide fresh drinking water After opening, store in a cool and dry place Not intended as a complete diet
